# JekyllNet

> Jekyll-style static site generator for .NET 10 — brings Jekyll/GitHub Pages workflows into the C# ecosystem.

JekyllNet is a .NET 10 static site generator that rebuilds Jekyll and GitHub Pages behaviours in C#. It supports front matter, layouts, includes, collections, posts, pagination, Sass/SCSS, multilingual AI translation, local preview, dotnet tool distribution, and reusable GitHub Actions.

## Project Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/JekyllNet/JekyllNet): Source code, issues, and pull requests
- [Website & Docs](https://jekyllnet.help): Full documentation site (English and Chinese)
- [NuGet Package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/JekyllNet): Install via `dotnet tool install --global JekyllNet`
- [GitHub Action](https://github.com/JekyllNet/action): Reusable `JekyllNet/action@v2.5` for CI/CD

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JekyllNet/JekyllNet/blob/main/README.md): Quick start, CLI usage, AI translation, development commands
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/JekyllNet/JekyllNet/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes
- [ROADMAP](https://github.com/JekyllNet/JekyllNet/blob/main/ROADMAP.md): Completed phases and upcoming work
- [English Docs Home](https://jekyllnet.help/en/): Full English documentation
- [Chinese Docs Home](https://jekyllnet.help/zh/): 中文完整文档
- [Getting Started (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/getting-started/): Installation, first build, CLI reference
- [Getting Started (ZH)](https://jekyllnet.help/zh/getting-started/): 安装与快速开始
- [Complete Usage Guide (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/complete-usage-guide/): End-to-end usage walkthrough
- [Compatibility (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/compatibility/): Jekyll/GitHub Pages feature compatibility matrix
- [Deployment / GitHub Pages (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/github-pages/): Deploy to GitHub Pages with JekyllNet
- [Latest Release — v0.2.5 (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/news/v0-2-5/): What is new in v0.2.5

## Optional

- [CLI Workflow Guide](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/cli-workflow/): `build`, `watch`, `serve` commands in depth
- [AI Translation Guide](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/ai-translation/): Multilingual pipeline with OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama
- [Configuration Guide](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/configuration-guide/): `_config.yml` options reference
- [Feature Overview](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/feature-overview/): All supported Jekyll features
